title: The Warriorr
desc: Upon getting forced out of his city, Sathya returns to seek revenge against Guru.
A scientist invents a time-travelling gadget that draws him into a bitter battle.

title: Bahubali 2: The Conclusion
desc: Mahendra Baahubali raises an army to defeat Bhallaladeva, for killing his father.

title: Baahubali: The Beginning
desc: While rescuing an enslaved princess, a young man discovers his true identity.
